claims.summary: The 1024/1025 dialogue-budget transition must be explicit and exactly tested.
claims.disposition: Verified exact profile-boundary and transition-evidence tests for 1024 and 1025.

claims.summary: Artifact markers can occur at boundaries, in context, or in quotations and should not be conflated.
claims.disposition: Verified separate boundary, contextual, and quoted occurrence accounting.

claims.summary: Cleanup needs a graded density and lexical-texture companion.
claims.disposition: Verified surface semantic density, lexical diversity, structural fraction, and semantic-integrity review.

claims.summary: Spectrum-dependent budgets or a behavior-changing token scanner could smooth the boundary.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because budget selection and cleanup behavior affect live model generation.
